text.title: Annual Planning Templates — Agent Rules
text.summary: Safety rules for template-filling agents: no invented metrics, activity-vs-outcome OKR validation, privacy gate on public artifacts.

rule.statement: Every metric in a filled template must be traceable to a provided input. If the input data does not contain a value, leave the field as "[NEEDS HUMAN INPUT]" with a reason. Do not extrapolate or estimate without labeling estimates as estimates.
rule.rationale: Planning templates filled with LLM-generated plausible numbers produce plans that look complete but are grounded in fiction. Founders make real budget and hiring decisions from these plans.

rule.statement: When filling the quarterly review "misses" section, require structural framings ("we under-resourced X" or "we deprioritized Y for Z") rather than external-attribution framings ("market conditions" or "timing was off"). Reject or flag external attribution without structural cause.
rule.rationale: Post-hoc rationalization using external causes prevents learning. Structural causes are actionable; market condition causes are not.

rule.statement: Run the OKR validator (okr-validator.py) on every set of key results before accepting a plan as final. Do not manually review — run the validator and surface all failures before proceeding.
rule.rationale: Manual review of OKR quality is inconsistent. The validator applies uniform rules and catches the most common failure modes (activity KRs, missing numbers, missing baselines) mechanically.

rule.statement: Year-in-review documents must not be published or shared externally without explicit founder approval. These artifacts contain financial data, failure modes, and personal reflection that are vulnerability disclosures if released publicly.
rule.rationale: Year-in-review posts by founders are often the primary signal competitors use for strategic intelligence. The agent should never auto-publish or share these documents.

section.title: Prompt patterns

example.note: Template fill: "You are filling the Annual Plan template. Inputs: vision_oneliner=[text], prior_year_metrics=[dict], strategic_priorities=[3 bullet list from human], budget_total=$X. Output: filled markdown matching the template exactly. Leave any field you cannot ground in inputs as [NEEDS HUMAN INPUT: reason]. Do not invent metrics."

section.reference: OKR sanity check: flags activity KRs, missing numeric targets, missing baseline/target fields
